electroacoustic.frequency_range_hz: 65 Hz - 20 kHz (usable bandwidth, -10 dB; extendable down to 32 Hz with SB18 subwoofer)
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak at 1 m, free field, 10 dB crest factor pink noise, [8XT_FI] preset
electroacoustic.components: 1x 8'' weather-resistant LF transducer in a bass-reflex tuned enclosure; 1x 1.5'' diaphragm compression driver coaxially loaded by the 8'' cone for HF directivity control; passive 3rd-order crossover network

operating_modes: HIGH-PASS (100 Hz HPF with separately-amplified SB18, system down to 32 Hz)
LOW-EXTENSION (8XT and SB18 on the same controller, system down to 32 Hz, requires custom preset)
amplification.preset_note: FR = FRONT (FOH), FI = FILL (flat free-field for speech/classical/fill), MO = MONITOR (flat half-space for floor/wall/ceiling). _100 variants add a 100 Hz high-pass for use with subwoofers. SB18 presets are used in LOW-EXTENSION mode when subs share the controller.
amplification.channel_assignment_note: LA4/LA4X output-channel routing changes with the selected preset; verify cabling before operating. PA signal routed via IN A (outputs 1-2) and IN B (outputs 3-4). System resources are optimized for 4 or 8 enclosures per controller (2 or 4 8XT plus 2 SB18 in LOW-EXTENSION mode).

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel for daisy-chaining a second enclosure
connection.wiring_convention: Pins 1+/1- carry the signal (IN+/IN-); pins 2+/2- not used
connection.recommended_cables: L-Acoustics SP.7 (0.7 m), SP10 (10 m), SP25 (25 m) 4-conductor 4 mm2 speakON cables
connection.parallel_limit: Maximum two 8XT per LA4/LA4X output channel (4 ohm load when paralleled)

physical.cabinet: 15 and 18 mm Baltic birch plywood, wedge-shaped; finish Grey Brown RAL 8019 or Pure White RAL 9010
physical.front: Polyester-coated steel grill with acoustically transparent Airnet fabric
physical.construction_note: Weather-resistant transducers and oxidation-resistant hardware for indoor and outdoor use

modes: Stacked (two fixed cabinet angles of 30 and 40 degrees from vertical)
Wall/ceiling-mounted via OMNIMOUNT 30.0 SERIES (four predrilled M6 inserts)
rigging_accessories: ETR8-2 adjustable wall/ceiling mounting bracket (sold separately)
OMNIMOUNT 30.0 SERIES brackets (four M6 inserts with screws)
M8 safety eyebolt insert on rear face
deployment.rigging_note: Refer to the XT and P rigging procedures manual for XT-range-specific procedures.

usage: Compact passive coaxial point-source for front-fill, distributed sound, floor monitoring, and small full-range systems; the smallest enclosure in the legacy XT coaxial range.

Exclusively driven by the LA4 or LA4X amplified controller, which supplies protection, filtering, and EQ; one amp channel powers one 8XT, or two in parallel, so a single 4-channel LA4/LA4X can run up to eight cabinets.
Run standalone in FULL RANGE mode (65 Hz - 20 kHz) when low-end extension is not needed; pick FRONT, FILL, or MONITOR presets to match FOH, free-field/speech, or half-space placement.

Pair with SB18 subwoofers for full-bandwidth coverage down to 32 Hz: HIGH-PASS mode runs the subs on separate amps, while LOW-EXTENSION mode shares one controller (custom preset required); the recommended ratio is two 8XT per SB18.
Daisy-chain a second enclosure through the parallel speakON outputs, but never exceed two 8XT per amp channel; keep cable runs short to maintain damping factor on the 4-ohm paralleled load.

Weather-resistant build with a wedge cabinet supports indoor/outdoor install duty - pole-mount, stack at 30 or 40 degrees, or fix to walls/ceilings via the ETR8-2 or OMNIMOUNT brackets with the rear M8 safety eyebolt.
